description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a dense hedge, with a driveway leading to a garage on one side and a main entrance facing the street. The structure features a complex, multi-gabled roof with several dormer windows, and the exterior walls are finished in a light color. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and a road, with a manicured lawn and a few small trees in the front yard. The house has a prominent front porch area, providing a sheltered entryway. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with additional windows visible on the sides and rear. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern bungalow elements, with a focus on residential comfort and curb appeal.
description: A single-story bungalow with a multi-gabled roof, surrounded by hedges, featuring a front porch, garage, and symmetrically arranged windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and symmetrical window arrangement with a clear view of the front porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the hedge boundary, with the roof's complexity more visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bungalow, dense hedge enclosure, and the roof's full span.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the driveway and garage visible, as well as the hedge and side windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
